feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: le slow board
entry.content: le slow board
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Overqualified Web Dev
entry.content: I've been making websites since 2001. I started by looking at source code of other sites and memorizing HTML and CSS. These days I could poop out a fully functional reddit clone from scratch in notepad.exe without editors, without stackoverflow, without documentation, and most of all, without AI handholding. I've never had a web development job in my life, despite being the utmost expert on everything world wide web. Dude, I was there when 4chan and the first memes were born. I think I might be
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Ever think about how hard the writer at R* beat his pencil dick while writing Trevor? >LIKE A REAL CRAZY SOCIOPATH - IMAGINE IF THE JOKER WAS REAL. HE ALSO RANTS ABOUT MODERN SOCIETY LIKE AMERICAN TORTURE BUT DESPITE BEING SADISTICALLY VIOLENT HE'S SOMEHOW CONSIDERED RELATABLE TO RETARDS UNFFFFFFFFF UUUUUUUGH *CUM* >BE STILL MY BEATING YET IMPOTENT ERECTION, AS I AM ABOUT DROP THE MOST HELLA F*CKING EPIC CHARACTER ON ALL OF GAMING >ALSO DESPITE BEING A CRIMINAL ON THE RUN FROM THE GOVERNMENT, HE
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: >A mysterious discovery is made on the outskirts of the remote harbor town. The residents find themselves in a desperate fight for survival against something they have never encountered before. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P61 ZeHLWvAk Shes now appearing in films that star both Korean and western actors.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Gen Z doesn't care about superheroes
entry.content: Unless it's Marvel Rivals, they give zero fucks. They're all in on YouTube horror and spoopy internet memes though. Hopefully Hollywood recognizes the profit potential and starts raiding all the license-free content.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The 3rd Year of Linux desktop
entry.content: Thanks to MicroSlop Corpooration fucking up windows so bad it's bottom line unusable. Thank You MircroJeet, thank you female devs rewriting winslop UI in React. Thank you indian workers for faking your CVs and using copilot for 80% of windows code since you can't code at all. Fast and snappy Qt/KDE + Linux, a line of coke, a bottle of scotch and my girl is all that makes me comfortable while watching windows being burned down to the ground.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm so depressed. I hate my parents and my life.
entry.content: I'm a girl and my dad thinks that gaming is for guys only. :/ he smashed my laptop while I was playing Don't Starve :// I hate him. My mom also doesn't speak up about his violent outbursts and just tell me to "be quiet because he's old". I feel like a prisoner in my own body. What's the most painless way to die, fellow anons? I'm sick and tired of being a 'lady' and study my ass off just to impress my shit parents. I'm scared of pain because my mom used to hit me with metal tongs. Even my psychi
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'd just like to point out that there is no difference between "AAA" and "indie"…
entry.content: I'd just like to point out that there is no difference between "AAA" and "indie" developers except scale. Both are companies, both are corpos and part of the industry. There is no "five guys making games in a cellar" any more, just small companies that will eventually become AA and then AAA if they don't implode from overhiring first. Just keep that in mind when an indie devs tries to guilt you for pirating their fake-retro pixel sidescroller or other quirkslop. The hobby was fucked the moment i
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 11 years later and still nothing comes close to this, GOAT game

entry.title: /int/ International: Never understood why gulfies turn their noses up on nafris, it's not that they'r…
entry.content: Never understood why gulfies turn their noses up on nafris, it's not that they're racist per se, they just see themselves as being better than us. Meanwhile nafris are taller, bigger, stronger, smarter, better educated, more good looking, more resourceful, and more cosmopolitan. The ONE thing gulfies have that nafris don't is money money cash.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: Happens iyc ?
entry.content: 4000€/month puts you in the top 10% of income in France, but you’d need 857 700€ to have a 10% net worth. Is your country so stratified that you basically have to inherit or you have no chance of becoming rich ?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: my life is pointless, because i am a man with a small dick who can't date girls.…

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Andy Serkis defends lack of diversity in Lord of the Rings cast
entry.content: It's so tiresome. Just make a faithful adaptation of Tolkien, European, Norse and Germanic mythology like the LOTR trilogy. >...[T]he previous Lord of the Rings films, made before colour-blind casting became common, had almost entirely white line-ups, and so far, his film looks like being the same. >Every major cast member announcement to date has been white; Jamie Dornan, Anna Taylor-Joy, Kate Winslet, Leo Woodall, as well as the returning stars including Elijah Wood and Sir Ian McKellan. The q
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The great majority of people spend their whole lives making excuses rather than …
entry.content: The great majority of people spend their whole lives making excuses rather than making progress. The habit of making excuses is fatal to your success. So, the question you have to ask yourself is: What excuses do you use not to move ahead? What is it that you think of? What is the excuse that looms into your mind whenever you think of something that you could do, have, or be? What is the excuse that pops into your mind? You say, "Well, I can't do that because..." Or another thing is, "Yes, but I
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3002
entry.content: >Black Sabbath Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84070368/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rent
